notes.note: A natural language name identifying the structure definition. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.
A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the structure definition.
The name of the organization or individual responsible for the release and ongoing maintenance of the structure definition.
The name of an individual to contact.
The name of an individual to contact.
A name for the specification that is being mapped to.
A name for the specification that is being mapped to.
A name for the specification that is being mapped to.
A name for the specification that is being mapped to.
A name for the specification that is being mapped to.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Status administrering. Skal vanligvis settes til 'Gjennomført' (completed), men 'Feilregistrert' (entered-in-error) MÅ benyttes hvis registreringen inneholder en alvorlig feil og skal slettes.
trans-unit.target: Administration status. It should usually be set to 'completed', but 'entered-in-error' MUST be used if the record contains a serious error and shall be deleted.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Kategoriserer administreringskonteksten. Bruk 'community' for selvadministrering — pasienten tar legemidlet selv, men det er utdelt av institusjonen.
trans-unit.target: Categorizes the administration context. Use 'community' for self-administration - the patient takes the medication themselves, but it is dispensed by the institution.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Det skal alltid være en referanse til pasienten som har blitt administrert legemiddel.
trans-unit.target: There shall always be a reference to the patient who received the medication.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: Episoden (f.eks. konsultasjonen/innleggelsen) som legemidlet ble administrert i forbindelse med.
trans-unit.target: The episode (for example the consultation or admission) associated with the medication administration.

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Referanse til hvilket institusjonsopphold eller avtale pasienten var på da legemiddelet ble administrert.
trans-unit.target: Reference to which institutional stay or appointment the patient was in when the medication was administered.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: Tidspunktet eller periode legemidlet ble administrert
trans-unit.target: The time or period when the medication was administered

notes.note: Text that can be used to describe the constraint in messages identifying that the constraint has been violated.
Text that can be used to describe the constraint in messages identifying that the constraint has been violated.
Text that can be used to describe the constraint in messages identifying that the constraint has been violated.
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: Årsak til utført administrering (Given as Ordered, Emergency, None)
trans-unit.target: Reason for the administration (Given as Ordered, Emergency, None)

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Referanse til rekvireringen som denne administreringen er basert på.
trans-unit.target: Reference to the request on which this administration is based.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Administrasjonsvei. Er begrenset til foreslått koding fra SNOMED CT-verdisettet til HL7 og Volven-kodeverket Administrasjonsvei (OID=7477) fra eResept.
trans-unit.target: Route of administration. Restricted to the proposed coding from HL7's SNOMED CT value set and the ePrescription code system Route of Administration (OID=7477).

notes.note: Explanatory notes and implementation guidance about the data element, including notes about how to use the data properly, exceptions to proper use, etc. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.comment).

trans-unit.source: Administrasjonsvei benyttes for å angi hvordan legemiddelet ble gitt.
trans-unit.target: Route of administration is used to indicate how the medication was given.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Administrasjonsvei kodet med SNOMED CT, hentet fra verdisett foreslått av HL7.
trans-unit.target: Route of administration coded with SNOMED CT, taken from the HL7-proposed value set.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.target: Route of administration (OID=7477) from the prescription code system collection.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).
A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.target: Description of the code (name) from the code system

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.target: Amount (dosage) of the medication's primary substance.
